title: All Stones Can as Raw Material│所有石頭皆可作為原料
description: Any stone can be used to craft stone products.│任何石頭都可以用於合成石製品。
body:
# Function│功能
- **Brewing Stand, Dropper, Dispenser, Piston, Lever, Observer, Furnace, Stone Sword, Stone Axe, Stone Hoe, Stone Shovel, Stone Pickaxe** recipes can be crafted with **Netherrack, End Stone, Cobblestone, Cobbled Deepslate, Blackstone, Andesite, Diorite, Granite, or Tuff** instead of just Cobblestone.│**釀造台、投擲器、發射器、活塞、拉桿、偵測器、熔爐、石劍、石斧、石鋤、石鏟、石鎬** 配方可用 **下界岩、末地石、圓石、深板岩圓石、黑石、安山岩、閃長岩、花崗岩或凝灰岩** 來合成而不只有圓石。
- **Stonecutter, Comparator, Repeater, Stone Pressure Plate, Stone Button** recipes can be crafted with **Stone, Deepslate, Basalt, Calcite, Sandstone, Red Sandstone, or Quartz Block** instead of just Stone.│**切石機、紅石比較器、紅石中繼器、石頭壓力板、石頭按鈕** 配方可用 **石頭、深板岩、玄武岩、方解石、砂岩、紅砂岩、石英方塊** 來合成而不只有石頭。
- **Blast Furnace** recipes can be crafted with **Smooth Basalt, Smooth Sandstone, Smooth Red Sandstone, Smooth Quartz Block** instead of just Smooth Stone.│**高爐** 配方可用 **平滑玄武岩、平滑砂岩、平滑紅砂岩、平滑石英方塊** 來合成而不只有平滑石頭。
